notableEvents.label: Rhys Hoskins pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Rhys Hoskins walks. Austin Hedges scores. Angel Martínez to 3rd. Steven Kwan to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Guardians challenged (tag play), call on the field was overturned: pitcher Parker Messick picks off Miguel Rojas at 2nd on throw to shortstop Gabriel Arias.

notableEvents.label: Miguel Rojas GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Miguel Rojas grounds into a double play, third baseman José Ramírez to second baseman Brayan Rocchio to first baseman Rhys Hoskins. Max Muncy out at 2nd. Miguel Rojas out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Will Smith pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Will Smith flies out to right fielder Angel Martínez.
